title: HireLoop
initial: HireLoop is a full-stack job portal platform where employers can post jobs and candidates can apply, track applications, and manage recruitment workflows efficiently.
description: HireLoop is a full-stack recruitment and job portal platform built with modern web technologies. It allows employers to post jobs, manage applicants, and track hiring progress, while candidates can search for jobs, apply, and monitor application status. The system includes authentication, role-based access control, secure APIs, and a responsive dashboard for both employers and job seekers.

title: Medi Appointment
initial: Medi Appointment is a full-stack healthcare appointment platform where users can explore doctors, book appointments, and manage schedules through a modern and user-friendly experience.
description: Medi Appointment is a full-stack healthcare appointment management platform built with the MERN stack. Users can browse doctors, search by specialization, book appointments, and manage schedules through a responsive and interactive interface. The project includes secure backend APIs, database-driven data management, and authentication features to provide a smooth and efficient healthcare booking experience.
overview: Users can explore and search doctors
REST API with secure backend integration

title: Book City
initial: Book-City is a modern bookstore frontend project where users can explore, search, and view books through an interactive and user-friendly interface using mock data.
description: Book-City is a responsive bookstore UI project built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. Users can browse book collections, search books, and view detailed book information through a smooth and modern interface. The project focuses on reusable components, clean UI design, responsive layouts, and efficient state management using mock data without backend integration.
overview: Users can explore and search books
Dynamic book listing and detail pages
Built using mock data without backend integration

title: Dragoon News
initial: Dragon News is a full-stack news portal where users can browse, publish, and manage news articles with authentication and role-based access.
description: Dragon News is a full-stack content management news platform that allows users to browse, publish, and manage news articles in an organized and efficient way. It includes authentication and role-based access control, enabling different user permissions for reading and publishing content. The platform is designed with a clean and responsive UI for a smooth reading experience across all devices.

title: Issue Tracker
initial: An Issue Tracker App is a collaborative project management tool that helps developers report, track, and resolve bugs or tasks efficiently with organized workflows.
description: Issue Tracker is a collaborative task management system designed to help developers efficiently report, track, and resolve bugs or tasks within a project. It provides an organized workflow where issues can be created, assigned, updated, and monitored in real time.
overview: Bug tracking and task management system
Simple and fast UI for productivity

title: Keen-Keeper
initial: Keen-Keeper is a social platform designed to help friends stay connected and maintain meaningful relationships.
description: Keen-Keeper is a social connection platform designed to help friends stay in touch and build stronger relationships over time.
overview: Helps users stay connected with friends

title: Expense Tracker
initial: An Expense Tracker is a simple financial management app that helps users record, monitor, and analyze their daily income and expenses efficiently.
description: An Expense Tracker is a financial management application designed to help users easily record, monitor, and control their daily income and expenses.
overview: Track daily income and expenses in an organized way
Sort transactions by date, category, or amount
Helps users analyze spending habits clearly
Supports better budgeting and financial planning
Simple and intuitive interface for easy use
